task: Unify Project Page Title Card with Blog Design
retrieved_context: Projects previously used a hardcoded header directly in the page.tsx file without using the layout component for the hero.
Blog and Research pages use ArticleLayout which includes an AmbientLight spotlight and translucent rounded hero panels.
architecture_constraints: Move Hero section logic out of page components and into specialized layout components (ProjectLayout).
Maintain strict visual parity between all content viewing pages (Blog, Research, Projects).
implementation_patterns: Pass complete content metadata (title, tags, urls, description) into the layout wrapper.
Use Framer Motion layout properties on headers to ensure smooth transitions between standard and distraction-free viewing modes.
